use_cases: Displaying tags and category labels on content items
Showing status indicators like active/inactive or new/popular
Indicating counts or numerical metadata in compact format
Marking user roles or permissions in interfaces
Highlighting product features or pricing tiers
ai_summary: A flexible badge/pill component with multiple style variants including default, secondary, destructive, and outline options. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Tailwind CSS for responsive styling. Features hover and focus states with smooth transitions, making it ideal for displaying tags, status indicators, and metadata across SaaS dashboards, e-commerce platforms, and content management systems.
